message:
fix(sync): extract should_wake_writer helper, fix WriteFuture acquisition, and add fairness tests

RwLock fairness and correctness improvements:

- Extract duplicated writer-vs-reader wake priority logic into a shared
  should_wake_writer() helper method, eliminating 3 copies of the same
  wrapping-arithmetic comparison across release_writer() and WriteFuture/
  OwnedWriteFuture Drop impls

- Fix WriteFuture/OwnedWriteFuture acquisition condition: replace
  `state.writer_waiters == 1` with `state.writer_queue.is_empty()` to
  correctly allow acquisition when this is the only writer waiting. The
  old check was wrong because writer_waiters counts all waiters including
  the current one, but the queue may have been drained by a wakeup

- Add comprehensive fairness tests:
  - release_writer_prefers_older_writer_over_reader: verifies FIFO
    ordering when both writer and reader are queued
  - rwlock_my_bug_test.rs: standalone regression test for a specific
    lost-wakeup scenario in the writer acquisition path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
